nl_query: Count honorarium summaries by role in board.
failed_sql:
SELECT hs.role_in_board, COUNT(*) AS summary_count
FROM   honorarium_summary hs
WHERE  hs.approval_status IN ('APPROVED', 'EXPORTED')
GROUP  BY hs.role_in_board
ORDER  BY summary_count DESC;
